synopsis: This is a world where "Jewel-sama" are born with jewels in their eyes and special abilities. They live in a vast mansion called the "Jewel Box," and their duty is to grant people's wishes. The new arrival at the Jewel Box is Yuni, a girl with iron ore in her eyes, who is far from a beautiful jewel. Although she started her life as a "Master Jewel," she was not able to help people as much as she would like. Then she meets Alecrea, a master jeweler who is rumored to be a "Jewel Killer." He seems to be pursuing the unknown dark side of the jewelry box. In order to get closer to the truth, Yuni helps Alecrea and meets various other jewelry masters. Little does she know that she herself will eventually become the one to change the world. Follow your wishes and uncover the truth of the beautiful jewel box world. The unpredictable buddy and love fantasy between a girl with black iron and a rebellious young man begins! (Source: Pixiv Sylph, translated)

title: Watashi wo Suki Sugiru Yuusha-sama wo Riyoushite, Konse koso Nagaikisuru Tsumori datta noni (Tabun, Mata Shippaishita)
titleRomaji: Watashi wo Suki Sugiru Yuusha-sama wo Riyoushite, Konse koso Nagaikisuru Tsumori datta noni (Tabun, Mata Shippaishita)
titleNative: 私を好きすぎる勇者様を利用して、今世こそ長生きするつもりだったのに（多分、また失敗した）
synonyms: I’m Using the Hero Who Loves Me Too Much, Because I Planned to Live a Long Life in This World (I Probably Failed Again)
synopsis: "Please, use me as you wish." Lizette, a count's daughter, is a "Recaller" who remembers her previous lives, and she is now on her fourth life. In her past lives, always on her 20th birthday, she would be killed and eaten by the same demon. So to live a long life this time, Lizette retreated to a remote countryside sanctuary, where monsters don't appear, living quietly and peacefully. But one day she met Ralph, a boy she saved in her childhood. Somehow, he had become the country's hero by defeating a demon lord. If she could stay by Ralph's side, she might not have to die this time... With this in mind, Lizette accepted his proposal. "I will protect you, Lisette-sama, even if it costs me my life." While bewildered by Ralph's exceedingly heavy affection, Lizette uncovers the truth behind her repeating deaths. Will Lizette be able to live pass her 20th birthday unharmed this time?! It's the start of a romantic comedy between the heroine who doesn't want to die and the intensely doting yandere hero! (Source: Comic Brise, translated)

title: Kanojo wa Kyou mo Katazukanai
titleNative: カノジョは今日もかたづかない
synonyms: She Is Not Good At Cleaning Every Day
synopsis: Aina Tawara works hard at her job, she's well regarded by her colleagues, and she has a steady boyfriend of six months. But her problem is that she just can't keep her room clean. On the other hand, there is Fukagawa-san, a man who always has a clean desk, doesn't care what others think, and never works overtime. He is the complete opposite of Aina, which makes him unappealing to her in every way. On the one hand, he is annoying, but on the other hand, she is envious of him... When Aina couldn't get her place tidied up in time, she had to cancel her date with her boyfriend, and it was going to be the worst Christmas ever. When Fukagawa-san saw her depressed, he invited her over to his place…? This is a story for the messy people. For those people who can't keep thing tidy at work and at life! (Source: Pixiv Comic, translated) Note: Chapter count includes a bonus chapter.

title: Kakure Tensei @COMIC
synopsis: In a remote corner of another world where only the nobility can use magic, a thirty-something office worker is reincarnated as a villager named Ren (5 years old). He enjoyed a laid-back life in the countryside, until the Cruel Angels (Pretty Angels) took a liking to him... Even though he wanted to be lazy, he ended up playing hide-and-seek, reading to them, calming them down, and more from morning to night, all because he was so caring! One day, while he was trying to think of ways to be lazy, a monster suddenly appeared in the peaceful village. When the problem children were targeted, the usually unmotivated Ren unleashed a hidden power he had been hiding to avoid trouble! This is the heroic tale of a carefree reincarnated boy who, with a sense of relief, babysits (and saves the country)! (Source: Corona EX, translated)

title: MOONLIGHT MILE
synopsis: Gorou Saruwatari and Lostman are mountain climbers who have ascended some of the highest mountains around the world. At the peak of Mount Everest, they see the ISA Space Station in the sky above and become determined to go into space. At the same time, NASA begins a program to research and obtain a new energy source which has been discovered on the moon. Gorou and Lostman attempt to join the program through different approaches: Lostman becomes a pilot and Gorou takes a job as a construction worker. Note: Originally completed with 23 volumes and 206 chapters on 2011-11-25, the author announced the publication of volume 24 on 2022-12-23, with the intention of continuing publishing irregularly.

However, the dragon takes pity on her helpless situation and restores Amalia's health in exchange for a favor: observing human life. The dragon then takes the form of a child, using "Yuugo" as an alias. As Amalia accepts Yuugo's request, she soon realizes that ten years have since passed. Mixed with shock and confusion, Amalia tries to start a new life with Yuugo as a foster son, doing her best to fulfill her new objective. Soon enough, Yuugo begins to show interest in the culture of tea, and as someone adept in brewing them, Amalia's tea-laden life will now begin!

title: Itsuka, Nemuri ni Tsuku Hi
synonyms: Someday, the day go to sleep
synopsis: Hotaru Morino is a second year high school student who has had an unrequited crush on Ren Otaka since junior high school. One day, while on a school trip with Ren and her good friend Shiori Yamamoto, their bus gets into an accident. When Hotaru wakes up, a young man who is dressed fully in black appears in front of her. He is Kuro, a grim reaper. A shocked Hotaru shoves him away but he has shocking words for her: "I'm your guide. Hotaru Morino, listen carefully. You're dead." Hotaru learns that if she does not get over her attachment to three things within 49 days, she will end up becoming a ghost bound to a specific physical location and wouldn't be able to rest in peace. She had slept for one month after the accident and has only 19 days left. And so, Hotaru sets out to settle the three lingering regrets with the limited time she has, in the company of Kuro. One of them is to confess her feelings to Ren, her crush of five years. However, when he is in front of her, she finds it impossible to tell him how she feels. As Hotaru settles her first lingering regret, dark clouds begin to gather over her and Kuro...

title: Sky Blue
synopsis: Kazama’s family died in a mysterious explosion when he was still young and since then, he has not been able to come to terms with their deaths or even with himself. He emotionally distances himself from everyone and his aggressive nature gets him the nick name “Real Life Combat Game Character.” Years later, Kazama, now in high school, gets close to death after a car accident. As he accepts his fate, Sky Blue enters his consciousness. Somehow related to the multicolored meteors that were seen all around the world on the same day of Kazama’s near fatal accident, Sky Blue is able to control his body. The teenage-looking Sky Blue is able to control Kazama’s body movements and even his speech. He falls for the beautiful but cold Haioka Anna and when she gets kidnapped, Sky Blue takes over Kazama’s body, unleashing enormous amounts of power and strength.

Only, he didn't expect that when he did, the man would turn out to be the master of a high-class ryokan and restaurant, or that he would have a young daughter. How did this happen? Why did he run?
